3061200.name: Pushika - Cat Suika Game
3061200.description:
😺 Welcome to Pushika, the perfectly relaxing game filled with fluffy felines and fickle fishes.😺😺😺

Game Features:
😽 Merge Cats: Combine two identical kitties to create a larger cat.
🐟 Special Fishes: Feed the kitties with special fishes and see what happens!
🏆 Achievements: Create enough cats to unlock new costumes.
😻 Charming Graphics: Enjoy vibrant, high-quality art style.
🧶 Relaxing Gameplay: Perfect for cat lovers and casual gamers alike.

🐈 Can you create the biggest cat in Pushika? Play now and start your merging adventure today! 🐈🐈🐈
